country_result:
Country: United States
Coordinates: 39.5000, -117.0000
Reasoning: The combination of Big Sagebrush (Artemisia tridentata) and the rounded, arid mountain topography is highly diagnostic of the Great Basin/Intermountain West region of the USA, specifically Nevada or Utah. The wooden utility pole design and the specific quality of the rural asphalt road further support a US location over Canada or Mexico. The landscape agent and botanics agent both strongly support the US based on the specific shrub-steppe vegetation and Basin and Range morphology.
